/usr/bin/ar qc libTurtleClassServer.a CMakeFiles/TurtleClassServer.dir/src/server/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TurtleClassServer.dir/src/server/accounts.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TurtleClassServer.dir/src/server/snapshot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TurtleClassServer.dir/src/server/http_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TurtleClassServer.dir/src/server/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TurtleClassServer.dir/src/server/maintenance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TurtleClassServer.dir/src/server/exception_report.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libTurtleClassServer.a
